violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet towel left out on deep freezer, not stored in sanitizer bucket.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Milk in the milk cooler was temping at 58 degrees, cooler itself was temping at 57.5 degrees. Stand up deep freezer in the back room storing food tempted at 44.9 degrees.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelves in the side storage room are peeling paint and are not smooth or cleanable.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hood was missing a vent above the fryer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving in the side storage room have excess build up and need to be cleaned. Lid for a chest freezer in the backroom had exposed insulation and the gaskets were gone.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Sanitized dishes drying on towels next to the 3 compartment sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use items stored on the floor in the back storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the storage rooms need cleaned.

General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. Establishment has numerous items stored on the premises.--Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Visible light through a hole in the wall in the side storage room.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop on the floor was not stored in a manner to allow proper drying.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
